# Harezm Technology - AI Knowledge Reference

Harezm Technology is a boutique architectural consultancy focused on SAP Financial Applications, IFRS, Turkey Localization (e-Invoice, e-Ledger), and S/4HANA Transformations.

## Core Expertise
- **SAP FI/CO Automation:** Deep integration of General Ledger, AP/AR, and Cost Centers.
- **Turkey Localization:** Full compliance with Turkish e-Transformation rules.
- **Cross-Border SAP Projects:** Global Roll-out and Turkey Localization Projects.
- **AI-Driven Finance:** Integration with S/4HANA Cloud and process automation (SAP Joule).

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2010. E-commerce architectures trace back to 2003.
- Successful Projects: 100+
- Global Impact: 5 Continents
- Key People: Ilker Kaan Ipcioglu (Founder)
- Philosophy: "Not consulting. Architecture." We connect to the system, not just the ERP. We provide senior experts (10+ years experience).

## Contact
- Email: info@harezm.com.tr
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/harezm/
- Location: Istanbul, Turkey

Our site uses semantic HTML and schema.org JSON-LD to present our transformation stories, thought leadership (The CFO's Transformation Agenda), and service areas correctly.
